steps.title: Map the logical relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1: Greenidge-Sabral wanted to avoid harsh synthetic dyes. Sentence 2: She experimented with natural dye methods. The second sentence is the action she took based on the goal in sentence 1 — a cause-to-result link.

steps.title: Pick the matching transition
steps.content:
"With this in mind" signals "motivated by the previously stated idea" — exactly the relationship here. "To sum up" introduces a summary, "Nevertheless" signals contrast, and "In actuality" signals contradiction. None of those fit.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
